name: harmonixpy

metadata.name: HarmonixPy
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: A simple module for serving HTML and managing dependencies with Flask.

documentation:
# HarmonixPy
Seamlessly Integrates Web Files with Android IDE using Flask

functions.name: HarmonixPy.PyO
documentation: Allow PyO() syntax for direct initialization

methods.name: HarmonixPy.flask_app.FlaskApp.load_html_content
documentation: Load HTML content from the specified file.

methods.name: HarmonixPy.flask_app.FlaskApp.html
documentation: Set a custom path for the HTML file.

methods.name: HarmonixPy.flask_app.FlaskApp.dependency
documentation: Set a custom path for the requirements file.

methods.name: HarmonixPy.flask_app.FlaskApp.install_dependencies
documentation: Install dependencies listed in the specified requirements file.

methods.name: HarmonixPy.flask_app.FlaskApp.run
documentation: Install dependencies and start the Flask app.
